selected_requirement: The system shall allow users to configure attendees without requiring them to be signed in.
The system shall allow users to adjust the darkness intensity of the user interface using a slider in the settings menu.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to rename audio tracks simultaneously.
The native Zoom survey tools shall enable users to submit post-meeting surveys, requiring version 5.8.3 or higher.
The software system shall enable users to assign scheduling privileges to co-hosts in both sub-accounts and the master account.
The software system shall enable users to join audio communication, contingent upon the host's permission.
The system shall provide users the capability to request access to the backstage area anonymously.
The software system shall provide users the capability to return chat messages as thumbnail previews.
The system shall provide users with the capability to receive notifications upon the successful download of shared files.
The software system shall enable users to rename the Breakout Room assignments of meeting participants while in the waiting room.
The Zoom for Government application shall enable users to sign in as different user types directly within the Zoom desktop client.
The desktop client version 5.1.0 shall enable users to disable meetings when the host mutes and subsequently unmutes a participant.
The Zoom desktop client shall provide users with the capability to access logs, provided that this feature is configured for their Zoom account.
The software system shall enable users to reorder non-video participants according to their preferences.
The mobile application shall enable users to share GIPHY content with a size limit of 30 MB.
The software system shall enable users to disable desktop notifications while in a meeting.
The software system shall enable users to right-click on outbound caller ID numbers while engaged in a call.
The system shall enable users to add a URL through the contact integration feature in Zoom Phone.
The system shall provide users with the capability to select files prior to sending a GIF.
The system shall provide users with the capability to disable Zoom files, which shall be disabled by default.
The client shall enable users to manage inbound call notifications directly within the client interface.
The software system shall enable users to select chat messages and apply reactions.
The Windows desktop client shall enable users to launch an external application from in-call controls without requiring the main Zoom client window to be opened.
The system shall automatically filter channel search results based on the user's current workspace, role, or project context, reducing search noise.
The patient portal shall provide users with the capability to disable the camera when necessary.
The desktop client shall enable users to remove Participants, provided that they have been granted write permission.
The system shall enable users to configure the requirement for a fresh Single Sign-On (SSO) login at the account level.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to automatically pause the sharing toolbar when entering full screen mode.
The web portal shall automatically suggest or apply geo-blocking based on detected security risks, user behavior, or regional compliance alerts.
The web portal shall provide users with the capability to take over call pickup groups, contingent upon authorization by an account owner and administrator.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to name up to 50 chats or channels.
The software system shall enable users to apply meeting restrictions to specific users or groups.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to resolve issues related to invalid local recording paths for audio devices.
The software system shall enable users to resolve issues with 8:9 aspect ratio videos that do not function properly during an immersive view.
The Immersive View shall enable users to pin themselves, contingent upon obtaining permission from the host.
The software system shall enable users to schedule phone calls for the Waiting Room and shall notify when participants join or leave a meeting.
The webinar shall provide users the capability to sort the Q&A section, with the default sorting order being chronological.

The software system shall provide users the capability to schedule a meeting ID with the "Join Before Host" feature enabled, allowing participants to join the meeting 5, 10, or 15 minutes prior to the scheduled start time.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to import participants from O365.
The software system shall provide users the capability to disable the display of closed captioning in the video window.
The software system shall enable users to select a channel during end-to-end encrypted (E2EE) meetings.
The system shall enable users to join missed meeting calls by dialing a designated phone number.
The software system shall enable users to provide participants with access to shared content.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to disable meeting reactions for each participant in the participant list.
The system shall enable users to display Personal Notes when accessed directly through the system's push notification.
The software system shall enable users to select videos individually.
The software system shall enable users to configure a phone number when adding or editing a synchronized cloud contact.
The software system shall enable users to view call log entries while they are engaged in an active call.
The software system shall enable users to rotate images captured by external cameras.
The desktop client shall enable users to configure authentication settings in accordance with the requirements established by their account owner or administrator.
The system shall enable users to initiate calls using their personal meeting ID from the Phone tab.
The Zoom application shall enable users to access the status of a specified subset of users.
The system shall allow the host to configure the operating system's language through the web portal.
The Zoom Chat system shall provide users with the capability to display participants' profile photos for the Show Video Message Button in the account-level web settings.
The software system shall enable users to activate privacy controls when creating or editing a channel or adding a member.
The Active Apps Notifier shall enable users to receive notifications in real-time.

cluster_name: Registry Key Updates for MSI Switches
selected_requirement: The system shall enable users to manage the latest version of the IT admin package following an update.
The software system shall enable users to configure their gender pronouns upon joining a meeting.
The software system shall provide users the capability to select an MP4 video from the 'More' menu located on the toolbar.
The desktop client shall enable users to schedule a profile picture using a previously established vanity URL.
The Zoom desktop client shall enable users to override the default communication option in MSI deployments.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to edit their hashed password links.
The software system shall provide users with the ability to access 1-on-1 chats and shall allow quick access to the 10 most recent chats.
The desktop client shall provide users with the capability to prevent automatic upgrades of the 32-bit version, which shall be disabled by default.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to route calls from the Receive Queue to telephone numbers located in Uruguay.
The system shall enable users to activate the Auto Reverse Virtual Background feature for video participants using client version 5.6.3 or higher.

The system shall automatically suggest or apply color grading and frame styles that adapt to the user’s detected facial expression or speaking tone to enhance visual communication (e.g., warm tones for friendly discussions, cool tones for professional presentations).
The software system shall provide users with the capability to enable the "Do Not Disturb" voice message during sharing activities.
The web portal shall enable users to send recordings to other users within the same account.
The software system shall enable users to terminate webinar chats for a specified subset of participants.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to require re-authentication for wildcard domains instead of using the user's profile name.

The system shall provide a ‘studio authenticity mode’ that disables echo cancellation and all post-processing while using AI analysis to preserve the speaker’s natural voiceprint and prevent audio artifacts caused by environmental noise.
